matched_patterns: Concrete road, vehicle, metal, fuel, fog, and bodily danger details.
Protagonist turns chaos into route, rule, and task list.
Module/system payoff arrives after cost and immediate danger.

delayed_explanations: Lu Chenzhou's full rescue accident history.
Full fog origin and system mechanics.
scene_triggers: Professional rescue actions justify mentioning his rescue background.
Refusal to enter the fog triggers a brief old-accident flash.
RV console activation triggers only the first system task.

strengths: The chapter opens with immediate vehicle danger and escalates into fog horror without a manual-style setup.
Lu Chenzhou's competence and boundary are visible through decisions under pressure.
The system reveal is compact and turns into a concrete next task instead of broad exposition.
The revised draft seeds Lin Zhixia with a distant medical command while saving her real entrance for chapter 2.
revision_suggestions: In final candidate, preserve the compact system text and avoid adding extra mechanics.
Keep Lin Zhixia unnamed in chapter 1 unless the human wants an earlier formal reveal.
A few action paragraphs may be grouped lightly for reading flow, but do not slow the opening.
